title: What Pasta Dish Wine Pairs Best With Viewing Evangelion
display_title: What Pasta Dish Wine Pairs Best With Viewing Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: What Pasta Dish/Wine Pairs Best With Viewing Evangelion?             Quote Post by Denny Watkin » Mon Jul 23, 2012 2:40 pm Hey there, So I'm having a friend over tonight and we are going to watch Evangelion together. It's going to be his first time watching Evangelion, and dinner was going to be prepared. And so I was wondering, what type of pasta dish and wine do you guys feel best pairs with Evangelion? It's really important to me that tonight goes smoothly and his viewing experience is beyond optimal. Something light? Something bold? I'm at wit's end. Thoughts, suggestions, opinions. Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Mon Jul 23, 2012 3:08 pm Hmm...some kind of white wine? I'd rather have something light and refreshing than one that will go to my head since Eva tends to require some concentration. Not sure what pasta I would do with that but I'd start there.

[]:             Quote Post by Vicious » Mon Jul 23, 2012 3:09 pm Ditch the wine and get some orange juice instead.

[]:             Quote Post by Denny Watkin » Mon Jul 23, 2012 4:22 pm hmmmm interesting point about the white wine. I almost want to say red as the religious connotations red wine has matches the show's use of religious imagery. In terms of pasta I'm still undecided, maybe a nice "angel" hair Alfredo? or perhaps ravioli? Orange juice would be perfect, if this were an Evangelion Breakfast.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 23, 2012 4:27 pm I don't know about pasta in this context (just copypasta ), but I found red wine an acceptable accompaniment .
